description_long: This chaise features a rectangular, boxy design with a high, straight backrest and solid wooden armrests on both sides. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a muted, dark brown fabric with a subtle mottled texture, giving it a slightly worn, vintage appearance. The wooden frame, visible on the sides and base, has a rich, reddish-brown finish and extends to form short, blocky legs that lift the chaise slightly off the ground. The upholstery appears to be a single continuous piece for both the seat and backrest, with no visible seams, buttons, or tufting. The overall construction is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for public or semi-public urban environments such as parks, waiting areas, or communal spaces. The design is minimalist, with no decorative embellishments, focusing on function and durability.
description: A boxy, wooden-framed chaise with dark brown mottled upholstery and solid side armrests, featuring a minimalist and utilitarian design. The seat and backrest are continuous and unadorned, emphasizing durability and function.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the straight backrest, wide seat, and both wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thickness of the backrest and seat, as well as the solid wooden armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and the wooden frame extending along the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, leg, and the continuous upholstery along the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and rectangular with no visible curvature or segmentation. It is fully upholstered in a mottled brown fabric and lacks any decorative elements such as tufting or buttons.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from solid wood with a flat, rectangular profile extending from the seat to the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, blocky, and integrated into the wooden frame, finished in the same reddish-brown wood as the armrests and base, with no decorative detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a subtle mottled texture in dark brown tones, with no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting, giving it a slightly worn, vintage look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous cushion for both the seat and backrest, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The arrangement is simple and unlayered.
